Thursday, Feb 19 · 5:00 PM to 8:30 PM CET

Synabi Business Solutions GmbH

Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13 · München, BY

Munich dbt Meetup

Hosted by Stephan D. and 3 others

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Munich dbt Meetup
4.7
34 reviews
Details

What are dbt meetups? dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🤝 Organizer: btelligent
🏠 Venue: Synabi Offices, Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13, 80807 München
🍕Catering: light bites and refreshments

✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨
17:00 | Registration (Registration will close at 17.50)
18:00 | Welcome Remarks & Housekeeping by b.telligent
18:15 | What’s new with dbt? 🎤 TBD (dbt Labs)
18:30 | First Talk: "How dbt saved the day on a toxic join issue." 🎤 Christian Eberhardt (btelligent)
19:00 | Second Talk: "Startup to ScaleUp Lessons from FINN`s Data Journey" 🎤 Giacomo Coletto (FINN)
19:30 | Drinks, Discussion & Networking

Important Notes:

The venue has capacity limits. Please RSVP if you intend to come and change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going".
The doors open at 5pm. If you arrive before, we may not be ready to welcome you yet!
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

Since 2016, dbt Labs has been on a mission to help data practitioners create and disseminate organizational knowledge. dbt is the standard for AI-ready structured data. Powered by the dbt Fusion engine, it unlocks the performance, context, and trust that organizations need to scale analytics in the era of AI. Globally, more than 60,000 data teams use dbt, including those at Siemens, Roche and Condé Nast.

Learn more at getdbt.com, and follow dbt Labs on LinkedIn, X, Instagram, and YouTube

Tue, Nov 11, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CET

Synabi Business Solutions GmbH

Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13 · München, BY

Munich dbt Meetup (in-person)
F

Hosted by Felix B.

Munich dbt Meetup
4.7

Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Munich dbt to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
Join the conversation in the #local-munich channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally and make sure to join the #local-dach channel aswell.

✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨

17.30: Registration
**** Registration will close at 17.50****
18.00: Welcome
b.telligent | dbt
18.10: How dbt saved the on a toxic join issue
[btelligent] Christian Eberhardt
dbt is undoubtly a great tool which can help a lot.
Let me take you on a tour through a small project of integrating clicklog data.
Buckle up for an intense story with misunderstandings, twists & turns and a massive ETL end boss fight.
18:40: tba
tba
19.00-20.30: Networking
With Food & Drinks

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. With practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently and build trustworthy data for the whole organization. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Note: To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: Health & Safety

Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13 · München, BY

How to find us
Munich dbt & Snowflake Meetup (in-person)

Hosted by Thomas L. and 2 others

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Munich dbt Meetup
4.7
34 reviews
Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Munich dbt and Snowflake Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
Join the conversation in the #local-munich channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally and make sure to join the #local-dach channel aswell.

🤝 Organizer: btelligent
🏠 Venue: Synabi Offices, Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13, 80807 München

✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨
17.30: Registration
**** Registration will close at 17.50****
18.00: Welcome
b.telligent | dbt | Snowflake
18.15: Common pitfalls when building a data warehouse
[dbt] Tim Hiebenthal - Project A Ventures
Over the years, we have collected a list of best practices to avoid common pitfalls like inconsistent metrics and slow response times. Discover how to build a robust and adaptable data warehouse that fosters trust and alignment between data teams and stakeholders
18:45: Using the Snowflake Cortex Search Service to Interact with Your Documents
[Snowflake] Maja Ferle Snowflake Data Superhero - In516ht
This session, will demonstrate how to quick and easy it is to build a RAG (retrieval augmented generation) solution that enables us to chat with pdf documents in natural language. Maja will use Snowflake Cortex LLM (large language model) functions and the Cortex Search service to upload and process pdf documents and demonstrate how to ask questions to get specific information from the documents.
19.15-20.30: Networking
With Food & Drinks

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. With practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently and build trustworthy data for the whole organization. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Snowflake is a leading cloud-based data platform, trusted by thousands of organizations. Snowflake enables teams to manage and analyze their data with unprecedented flexibility and efficiency. Its architecture allows for the separation of storage and compute, providing cost-effective solutions tailored to diverse business needs. Snowflake empowers organizations to derive insights from their data in real-time, enhancing decision-making across the enterprise. Learn more: https://www.snowflake.com/

Note: To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: Health & Safety

events.page_title: Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs), Thu, Nov 21, 2024, 8:00 PM | Meetup
events.raw_text:
Skip to content
Homepage

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 · 8:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

Online event

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Munich dbt Meetup
4.7
34 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

Mon, Apr 17, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 9:30 PM CEST

Synabi Business Solutions GmbH

Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13 · München, BY

Munich dbt Meetup

Hosted by Nicole A.

Munich dbt Meetup
4.7
34 reviews
Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Munich dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
🇩🇪 Join the conversation in the #local-munich channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.

🤝 Organizer: b.telligent
🏠 Venue: Synabi Offices, Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13, 80807 München
✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨
17.30: Registration
**** Registration will close at 17.50****
18.00: Welcome b.telligent & dbt organisers
18.15: First presentation Talking Bout My (Code) Generation, Olaf Bowe,
Head of Competence Center Visual Data Discovery at b.telligent
18:45: Second presentation Our continuously evolving data infrastructure Michal Lapinski - Kleber at Data Infrastructure Lead at Frontify
19.15-20.30: Networking, Pizza & Beer

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
